narrative:
Coshocton 1-B (precinct in Coshocton County) has 916 registered voters, with 68.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
